ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "password_salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  "password_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the password expires */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the account is locked */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time the password was last changed */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_joined" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is an administrator */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is a staff member */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is a superuser */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the user belongs to */,
  "mfa_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if multi-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Preferred locale */,
  "notification_email" TEXT /* Email address for notifications */,
  "notification_sms" TEXT /* Phone number for SMS notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Token used to identify the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_timeout" INTEGER /* Session timeout duration in minutes */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, expired, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role */,
  "role_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User who assigned the role */,
  "role_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the role assignment expires */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment (e.g., active, expired, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, action) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity occurred */,
  "activity_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device from which the activity occurred */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_password_reset_requests" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the password reset */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token used to reset the password */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reset request was made */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reset token expires */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the reset token has been used */,
  "reset_request_source" TEXT /* Source of the reset request (e.g., email, SMS, web form) */,
  "reset_request_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the reset request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_password_reset_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "org_status" TEXT /* Status of the organization */,
  "org_type" TEXT /* Type of organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_organizations_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-organization mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the organization */,
  "role_in_org" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's role within the organization */,
  "role_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user's role in the organization expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_organizations_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_organizations_map_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES user_organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* Dashboard layout preferences */,
  "dashboard_view" TEXT /* Preferred view of the user's dashboard */,
  "email_frequency" TEXT /* Preferred frequency of emails */,
  "sms_frequency" TEXT /* Preferred frequency of SMS notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
